uplink.description: Full fix frame: UTC timestamp, GPS coordinates, ground speed, GNSS fix, accelerometer, temperature, barometric pressure, battery lifetime, and a free-fall safety event (motion).
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload. GPS/ground-speed/fix/battery fields are byte-for-byte consistent with the working upstream decode (reference/upstream-codec.js); temperature, barometric pressure, accelerometer and the safety/dead-zone bitfields are authored from the documented field table because the upstream generic engine mis-decodes those (temperature/pressure -> [0], accelerometer throws, bitfields read 0). lat raw 0x402C27 (45/1.07e-5), lon raw 0xCAC58C (-75/2.15e-5), alt raw 0x102B, temp 235*0.1=23.5C, pressure 10132*0.1=1013.2hPa, safety bit1=free-fall.

uplink.description: GPS fix with GNSS dead-zone status and a shock-impact safety event (motion).
uplink._note: Synthetic. gnss_status byte 0x1B -> dz0=3,dz1=2,dz2=1,dz3=0; safety bit2=shock-impact -> action.motion.detected true.

uplink.description: GPS fix with calibrated pressure and an emergency-button safety event (no motion).
uplink._note: Synthetic. safety byte 0x01 = emergency button only -> action.motion.detected false (button press is not motion). cal_barometric_pressure 10132*0.1=1013.2hPa -> calibratedPressure extra.

uplink.description: Battery lifetime percentage and days remaining (upstream example input).
uplink._note: Input from the upstream YAML example; upstream decodes battery_lifetime_pct=100 and battery_lifetime_dys=409 (this path works upstream). We surface them as camelCase extras (percentage, not the volt-valued `battery` vocabulary key).

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (config/downlink-response port, not a data uplink).
uplink._note: Only fPort 10 carries the normalized measurement frame.
0xAB 0xCD is not a defined SEAL fPort-10 header.
